keywords.title: Job title keywords
keywords.description: Titles / roles to search for. Each is searched on every selected source and city.

cities.title: Cities
cities.description: Cities to search within the country below.

country.title: Country
country.description: Country the cities belong to. Defaults target Saudi Arabia.

maxItemsPerKeyword.title: Max jobs per source + keyword
maxItemsPerKeyword.description: Caps how many jobs are kept from each source for each keyword/city combination.

joobleApiKey.title: Jooble API key (optional)
joobleApiKey.description: Free key from https://jooble.org/api/about. When set, Jooble is queried through its official API instead of the public site.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Use a proxy for outbound requests. Residential proxies unblock GulfTalent / Tanqeeb, which return 403 to data-centre IPs.
